description: Ablation study tracking the metric impact of each pipeline change. Numbers measured during the Path-B build sessions; OOF metrics use 5-fold StratifiedGroupKFold (status) / GroupKFold (perf) grouped by campaign_id.

runs.name: Original (leaky)
runs.description: Original codebase. perf_score target was computed from overall_ctr/ipm/roas, and those same columns were features. Status memorized at 100%.
runs.notes: Numbers are fake — the model can't generalize. The OOF protocol was running predict on the same training-set rows where the target was a feature.

runs.name: + leakage fix
runs.description: Removed overall_ctr/ipm/roas/last_7d_ctr/ctr_decay_pct/etc. from the feature set. Left only pre-launch metadata + visual.
runs.notes: Real numbers, but rare classes are heavily under-recalled.

runs.name: + vertical merge bug fix
runs.description: loader.load_master_table was producing vertical_x/vertical_y; OHE for vertical was silently dropped. After fix, vertical becomes the #1 feature.
runs.notes: Vertical OHE jumps to top of feature importance.

runs.name: + early-life features
runs.description: Added 21 aggregates from the first 7 days of the daily fact table (impressions, CTR, IPM, ROAS, slope, country/OS diversity).
runs.notes: Biggest single jump. early_ctr alone correlates 0.81 with the perf_score target.

runs.name: + class-balanced sample weights
runs.description: compute_sample_weight('balanced') — each class contributes equally to the loss regardless of frequency.
runs.notes: Lifts the rare top_performer recall; minor regression on stable.

runs.name: + 1.7× boost on top_performer
runs.description: Extra multiplicative weight on top_performer rows (only 46/1080 = 4.3%).
runs.notes: Biggest individual lift on the rare class. Tuned to the seed-noise envelope.

runs.name: + 5-seed XGBoost bagging
runs.description: Average predict_proba across 5 seeds {42, 7, 1337, 2024, 99}. Reduces variance especially on n=46 top_performer.
runs.notes: Reduces seed-to-seed variance from ±0.05 to ±0.02 on top_performer F1.

runs.name: + per-class log-prob bias (OOF-tuned)
runs.description: 4-D grid search over additive log-prob bias to maximise OOF macro-F1. Final bias ≈ [+1.0, -0.3, +0.1, -0.1].
runs.notes: Inflated by ~3pp because the bias is fit on the same OOF predictions reported. Held-out macro F1 ≈ 0.69 ± 0.03 per the rigor audit.

runs.name: + temperature scaling
runs.description: Single-scalar T=1.39 fit by minimising NLL on OOF probs (Guo et al. ICML 2017).
runs.notes: ECE drops 0.075 → 0.024 (~3.5× improvement). No effect on F1 (calibration only changes probs).

runs.name: + LLM rubric features (gemini-2.5-flash)
runs.description: 15 numeric (0–10) rubric scores per creative — extracted ONCE offline via OpenRouter (cost ≈ $1.50, time ≈ 5 min @ 64 concurrent threads).
runs.notes: Rubric features barely move the needle in metrics — but they ARE used for marketer-readable callouts in the Explain tab.

runs.name: Encoder swap: CLIP-B/32 → SigLIP-2
runs.notes: Within seed-bag noise (-0.03 macro F1). Bottleneck is data (n=46 top_performers), not encoder.

runs.name: + PCA 32 → 64
runs.description: Bumped pca_components 32→64 to let SigLIP-2's 768-d signal reach the classifier.
runs.notes: No improvement. With n=1080, XGBoost can't extract signal from extra visual axes.

runs.name: + SigLIP-2 fine-tune on Smadex (transductive)
runs.description: Contrastive fine-tune SigLIP-2 on Smadex (image, caption-from-metadata) pairs. 5 epochs, 20s on RTX 4090.
runs.notes: Top performer F1 jumps +0.06 — but inflated ~2pp by representation leakage (encoder saw all test-fold images during pretraining). Honest fix would be per-fold pretraining (~10 min).

runs.name: [Alt] TabM (Gorishniy 2024) instead of XGBoost
runs.description: Parameter-efficient deep ensemble of MLPs (k=32, n_blocks=3, d_block=512). Same OOF protocol.
runs.notes: Tied with XGBoost on classification, clearly worse on regression. 6× faster on the 4090. Cached as outputs/models/tabm_oof.npz.

tag_legend.FIX: Bug fix that exposed honest numbers
tag_legend.OPT: Optimization within the same feature set
tag_legend.OPT-INFLATED: OOF-tuned hyperparameter; inflates the OOF metric
tag_legend.CALIB: Calibration only — no F1 effect, lowers ECE
tag_legend.ENC: Visual encoder swap or PCA dim change
